message:
refactor(tests): replace unwrap with expect/unreachable across test suites

Replace bare .unwrap() calls with .expect("should succeed") and
.unwrap_err() with .expect_err("should fail") in epoch_transition,
revocation_freshness, evidence_ledger, and verifier_sdk tests for
clearer failure diagnostics. Use unreachable!() instead of panic!()
for impossible match arms in evidence_ledger. Suppress unused-binding
warning in verifier_sdk replay match arm. Refactor test_capsule()
helper to use create_capsule() to reduce boilerplate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
